fix\(babylon\): complete Babylon.js backend implementation with all cart compatibility fixes

Major fixes implemented:

1. **2D Text Rendering Fixed** \(Lines 266-319\)
   - Root cause: putImageData\(\) IGNORES globalCompositeOperation
   - Solution: Use temporary canvas + drawImage\(\) which DOES respect composite operations
   - Created _fbCanvas and _fbCanvasCtx for proper layering
   - Draw framebuffer UNDER 2D text using ''destination-over'' composite mode
   - Result: Start menus, HUD text, scores all now visible

2. **Player Boundaries Fixed** \(Lines 694, 698, 709, 714, 741, 747\)
   - Root cause: Babylon.js Vector3 has no .set\(\) method - calls were silently failing
   - Changed all Vector3 operations to use copyFromFloats\(x, y, z\)
   - Fixed: setPosition\(\), setScale\(\), setRotation\(\), setCameraPosition\(\), setCameraTarget\(\)
   - Result: Player now stays within bounds in Space Harrier and all carts

3. **Missing Functions Added and Exposed**
   - createAdvancedCube\(\) \(Lines 615-619, exposed 870\)
   - createAdvancedSphere\(\) \(Lines 627-631, exposed 873\)
   - setMeshVisible\(\) \(Lines 707-711, exposed 929\)
   - enablePixelation\(\) \(Lines 828-837, exposed 946\)
   - enableDithering\(\) \(Lines 839-842, exposed 947\)
   - setDirectionalLight\(\) \(Lines 788-820, exposed 940\)

4. **Three.js Compatibility Shims** \(Lines 109-113\)
   - Added scene.add\(\) as no-op compatibility shim
   - Babylon auto-adds meshes to scene, so this prevents F-Zero skybox crashes
   - Allows Three.js API calls to work seamlessly with Babylon backend

5. **Additional Backend Compatibility**
   - runtime/api-effects.js: Added Babylon.js detection to skip Three.js post-processing
   - runtime/xr.js: Added null checks for renderer.xr \(Babylon doesn''t have this\)

Carts now working:
- ✅ Space Harrier 3D - Player boundaries, controls, 2D text HUD
- ✅ Crystal Cathedral 3D - Advanced sphere/cube materials, pixelation
- ✅ F-Zero - Skybox rendering with scene.add\(\) shim
- ✅ WAD Demo - Directional lighting
- ✅ All carts with start menus - 2D text rendering

Build: Successfully compiled to dist/assets/main-BE1rNMim.js
